entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where market liberalization occurred to improve efficiency for smallholder farmers

entities.name: LIBERALIZED MARKETS
entities.description: Markets opened to improve efficiency and enhance linkages for smallholder farmers

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating on a small scale who are the target of market liberalization

entities.name: TRANSACTION COSTS
entities.description: Costs that constrain the functioning of markets along the production-to-consumption value chain

entities.name: COORDINATION PROBLEMS
entities.description: Issues along the value chain that constrain market functioning

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL ARRANGEMENTS
entities.description: New structures needed to reduce transaction costs and fill the vacuum left by government withdrawal

entities.name: PRODUCER ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Institutional innovations used to remedy market failures in rural economies

entities.name: COLLECTIVE MARKETING GROUPS
entities.description: Groups formed as instruments to remedy pervasive market failures

entities.name: EASTERN KENYA
entities.description: The region where the case study on Producer Marketing Groups was conducted

entities.name: COLLECTIVE ACTION
entities.description: Action embodied in Producer Marketing Groups that is feasible and useful for farmers

entities.name: PRODUCER MARKETING GROUPS
entities.description: Collective action groups (PMGs) used for marketing agricultural produce

entities.name: EXTERNAL SHOCKS
entities.description: Unforeseen events that limit the volume of trade and access to capital and information

entities.name: STRUCTURAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Limitations that restrict trade volume and access to capital and information

entities.name: CAPITAL
entities.description: Financial resources required for PMG operations and competitiveness

entities.name: INFORMATION
entities.description: Knowledge required to exploit scale economies and improve trade

entities.name: SCALE ECONOMIES
entities.description: Cost advantages that PMGs aim to exploit through coordination mechanisms

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY DECISION MAKING
entities.description: A level of collective action that determines the effectiveness of PMGs

entities.name: MEMBER CONTRIBUTIONS
entities.description: Inputs from members that determine the effectiveness of PMGs

entities.name: START-UP CAPITAL
entities.description: Initial funding that determines the effectiveness of PMGs

entities.name: CAPITAL CREDIT
entities.description: Credit facilities whose absence stifles PMG competitiveness

entities.name: GOVERNANCE
entities.description: The management structure of PMGs that requires improvement

entities.name: RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies needed to protect PMGs from external shocks

entities.name: BUSINESS SKILLS
entities.description: Skills required by PMGs to enhance their competitiveness
